Module me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.core
Package me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.host

Interface FlixelHostIntegration

All Known Implementing Classes:
FlixelNoopHostIntegration
public interface FlixelHostIntegration
Host operating system integration, which allows desktop notifications and taskbar attention.

This is separate from FlixelAlerter, which shows blocking dialog popups. Use Flixel.host from game code.

Desktop LWJGL3 ships a full implementation (freedesktop notify-send on Linux rather than AWT for toasts, GLFW plus AWT java.awt.Taskbar for attention where available). Mobile and web builds keep the safe no-op implementation.

Example: 


 Flixel.host.sendDesktopNotification("Ready", "Your level finished loading.");
 Flixel.host.requestUserAttention();
See Also:
  • Flixel.host

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    requestUserAttention()
    Asks the window manager to highlight this app (taskbar entry flash, dock bounce, and similar).
    void
    sendDesktopNotification(@Nullable String title, @NotNull String message)
    Shows a non-blocking desktop notification using the platform provider (Action Center on Windows, Notification Center on macOS, D-Bus or libnotify on Linux).
    boolean
    supportsDesktopNotification()
     

  • Method Details

    • sendDesktopNotification

      void sendDesktopNotification(@Nullable @Nullable String title, @NotNull @NotNull String message)
      Shows a non-blocking desktop notification using the platform provider (Action Center on Windows, Notification Center on macOS, D-Bus or libnotify on Linux).
      Parameters:
      title - Short title, or null to use a blank title when the OS allows it.
      message - Body text; must not be null.

    • requestUserAttention

      void requestUserAttention()
      Asks the window manager to highlight this app (taskbar entry flash, dock bounce, and similar).

    • supportsDesktopNotification

      boolean supportsDesktopNotification()
      Returns:
      true if sendDesktopNotification(String, String) is expected to do useful work on this platform session.
